title: Launchd wrapper hardening — full coverage
description: Wrapper-level POST_RUN_CHECK validator + headless prompt + SKILL.md MANDATORY validator section for all mutating scheduled skills. Pattern: feedback_mutating_skill_hardening_pattern.md. L1+L2+L3 shipped 2026-04-25 for target-discovery Phase 2. Plist timing fix 2026-04-26: Phase 2 moved 22:00 → 15:00 so pool exists before jj-operations 18:00 fire. L4 = extend pattern to 4 remaining mutating skills.

title: Tech-stack audit: monthly vs annual across all SaaS subscriptions
description: Audit all current SaaS subscriptions in budget tracker. For each: identify billing cadence (monthly/annual), renewal date, monthly-equivalent cost, and whether tool is actively used daily. Flag annual subscriptions that should have been monthly per memory/feedback_saas_monthly_first.md. Output: ranked list of tools to (a) cancel at next renewal, (b) downgrade to monthly, (c) keep annual. Trigger: queue into next budget-manager run.

title: L4: relationship-manager wrapper hardening
description: Add POST_RUN_CHECK validator for daily 7am relationship-manager. Mutates Attio People records (cadence updates, action-already-taken verification). Validator confirms artifact written + Attio writes succeeded (currently broken — Attio MCP needs key rotation Sunday 4/26).
notes:

- scripts/validate_relationship_manager_integrity.py (artifact existence + frontmatter + sections + size)

- Smoke test: validator passes on today's artifact (8021 bytes)

title: L4: weekly-tracker wrapper hardening

title: L4: jj-operations-sunday wrapper hardening
description: Add POST_RUN_CHECK validator + headless prompt for jj-operations Sunday prep mode. Validates Mon-Fri Call Log tabs created with Col K (Owner Name) populated for all enriched rows. Failure → Slack 'VALIDATOR FAILED'.
